description_long: This is a three-story brick commercial building with a prominent red and beige gabled roof and a large bay window on the upper floors. The ground floor features a storefront with a red sign reading 'Fishaloni's Fish & Chips' in white letters, flanked by large display windows and a recessed entrance. The upper stories have white-framed windows, with the second floor featuring a protruding bay window and the third floor a triangular gable. The side and rear walls are plain red brick with no windows or doors, and the roof is covered in reddish-brown shingles. The building sits on a concrete base, with a small awning above the entrance and a paved area in front. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, typical of a small urban commercial property.
description: A three-story brick commercial building with a red gabled roof, large bay windows, and a red storefront sign reading 'Fishaloni's Fish & Chips'. The ground floor features display windows and a recessed entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red storefront sign, large display windows, recessed entrance, and bay windows above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain red brick wall with no windows or doors, and the gabled roof profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat brick wall and the full extent of the roof and concrete base, with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain brick wall and the bay window structure visible at the front.
attribute_storefront_signage: A red rectangular sign with white text reading 'Fishaloni's Fish & Chips', placed above the entrance and display windows, with a simple, bold font.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a recessed entrance on the right, large display windows on the left, and a prominent red sign above. The upper floors have bay windows and a gabled roof, with no exterior displays or decorations.
